disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A fully rigid, unwanted erection has persisted for more than six hours and is no longer associated with any sexual desire
trigger_question_examples: How long has the erection lasted?
Is it still linked to being aroused, or has it stayed up on its own?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's been completely rigid for over six hours now and it has nothing to do with being turned on — it just won't go down.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe, progressively worsening deep penile pain that the patient cannot tolerate any contact against
trigger_question_examples: How bad is the pain and is it changing?
Can you bear anything touching it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The pain is agonizing and it's been getting worse over the last few hours — I can't stand anything touching it, not even clothes.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The erection began shortly after using an intracavernosal (penile) injection for erectile dysfunction
trigger_question_examples: Did anything happen just before it started?
Have you used any medication or injection for erections?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I used my penile injection for erection problems earlier in the evening and it just never went down.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The head/tip of the penis feels soft while the sides of the shaft feel stone-hard, and an early blue/dark discolouration is appearing along the shaft
trigger_question_examples: What does it look and feel like now — the tip versus the sides?
Has the colour of the skin changed at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The tip feels soft but the sides are like stone, and the skin is starting to go a bit blue/dark along the shaft.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Increasing difficulty starting to pass urine because of the rigidity and tightness
trigger_question_examples: Are you still able to pass urine normally?
Is it getting hard to start weeing?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's getting really hard to start weeing because it's so hard and tight, but I can still just manage a bit.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Denies any recent blow, straddle injury or trauma to the perineum or genitals
trigger_question_examples: Did you have any knock, fall or injury to the area recently?
Any straddle injury, like landing on a bar or bike?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, there was no injury or knock to the area at all — nothing like that.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Denies use of oral erectile-dysfunction tablets or recreational stimulants (e.g. cocaine) on this occasion
trigger_question_examples: Did you take any other tablets for erections tonight?
Any other drugs or stimulants involved?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, just the injection — no tablets and no other drugs.
